ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "dbn" TEXT /* Database Number (DBN) of the school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the school */,
  "principal" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in the school */,
  "grades_offered" TEXT /* Range of grades offered (e.g., 9-12) */,
  "school_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school category */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_school_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_category_id") REFERENCES school_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sat_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SAT score record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school associated with the scores */,
  "num_test_takers" INTEGER /* Number of SAT test takers at the school */,
  "avg_critical_reading" REAL /* Average score in SAT Critical Reading */,
  "avg_math" REAL /* Average score in SAT Math */,
  "avg_writing" REAL /* Average score in SAT Writing */,
  "test_year" TEXT /* Year the SAT was taken */,
  "num_test_takers_9th" INTEGER /* Number of 9th-grade test takers */,
  "num_test_takers_10th" INTEGER /* Number of 10th-grade test takers */,
  "num_test_takers_11th" INTEGER /* Number of 11th-grade test takers */,
  "num_test_takers_12th" INTEGER /* Number of 12th-grade test takers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sat_scores_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the district */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the district */,
  "superintendent" TEXT /* Name of the district superintendent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Head of the department */,
  "department_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "department_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, faculty) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Content of the report in text format */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school where the intervention is applied */,
  "date_initiated" TEXT /* Date when the intervention was initiated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention (e.g., tutoring, study program) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the intervention (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role within the system */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Public, Private, Charter) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of category (e.g., funding, governance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
